heroImageAlt: Volunteers and guests together in a welcoming hospice setting
heroShortDescription: Give your time in a way that fits your life and help us create a warm, welcoming environment for local families.
introHeading: Your time makes a real difference
introParagraph1: Dove Cottage volunteers play a vital role in the smooth running of the hospice. Around 120 people give their time, expertise, and commitment to support our work, helping us create a warm, welcoming environment for guests, families, carers, visitors, and supporters.
introParagraph2: The time given by volunteers saves the hospice around £250,000 each year. More importantly, it helps make Dove Cottage feel personal, friendly, and connected to the local community.

sectionImage.alt: Dove Cottage volunteer gazebo and information stand at a community event

waysIntro: There are different ways to volunteer, depending on your interests, availability, and experience. Full training is given, and we will talk with you about the role that feels right.

roles.title: Hospice support
roles.description: Help create a friendly, welcoming environment for guests by supporting day-to-day activities, refreshments, companionship, or practical tasks around the hospice.

roles.title: Volunteer driving
roles.description: Support guests by helping them travel safely to and from Dove Cottage. Mileage expenses are paid for hospice drivers.

roles.title: Shop volunteering
roles.description: Join one of our friendly charity shop teams and help with serving customers, sorting donations, preparing stock, and keeping the shops welcoming.

roles.title: Fundraising and events
roles.description: Help with community events, fundraising activities, collections, or behind-the-scenes support that keeps Dove Cottage visible and active locally.

expectHeading: What to expect as a volunteer
expectParagraph1: You do not need to have volunteered with a hospice before. We will talk with you about your interests, availability, and any experience you would like to bring, then help you find a suitable role.
expectParagraph2: Some volunteers like to help at the same time each week, while others prefer to support us occasionally when a need arises. We have days and hours to suit different circumstances.
expectParagraph3: Full training is provided, and you will be supported by the Dove Cottage team throughout your time with us.
sideFormHint: Ask about current volunteer roles and next steps.

sideSupportLinks.label: See all ways to support us
